name: Rice Primavera
recipeIngredient: 1/4 teaspoon Ground white or red pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the garlic and cook until fragrant, then discard the garlic.
2. Add broccoli, zucchini, and mushrooms to the skillet. Cook until they are almost tender crisp.
3. Stir in tomatoes and parsley; cook for an additional minute.
4. Remove vegetables from the skillet and set aside.
5. Return the skillet to medium heat. Add mayonnaise, milk, Parmesan cheese, and pepper. Stir until smooth.
6. Gradually add cooked rice, stirring to coat evenly.
7. Stir in the reserved vegetables; cook until heated through.
8. Serve immediately.
